content:
Expanding Digital Reach

Today, Aoura Group is pleased to announce it has finalized a definitive agreement to acquire Vortex Media, a global leader in digital publications and content monetization systems, in an all-cash transaction valued at $450 million. This acquisition marks a significant milestone in our corporate strategy to scale physical and digital platform ecosystems.

"Vortex Media brings world-class adtech capabilities and a massive consumer base that aligns perfectly with our digital service strategy."

Strategic Synergies

Through this integration, Aoura Group will integrate its predictive analytics suite directly into Vortex Media's publication pipeline. Key benefits include:

  • Unified ad-bidding framework targeting premium conversion.
  • Cross-platform user account integration for over 20 million subscribers.
  • Advanced spatial content options powered by upcoming Aoura Products.

Execution & Integration Timeline

The transition phase will begin immediately, with complete business unit integration expected by the end of Q4 2026. Shareholder approval is not required, and both boards of directors have unanimously approved the transaction. Further operational updates will be presented during the upcoming shareholder call.
